description_long: This is a modern, industrial-style ceiling lamp fixture featuring a circular, flat mounting plate and three adjustable spotlight heads. The lamp heads are conical and metallic, each attached to the base with articulated joints that allow for directional adjustment. The fixture is supported by slender metal arms that connect the lamp heads to the mounting plate, providing both structural support and a minimalist aesthetic. The lamp heads have vented backs and protective mesh or glass covers at the front, suggesting durability and heat dissipation. The overall design is functional and utilitarian, suitable for spaces requiring focused, adjustable lighting such as garages, workshops, or urban lofts. The finish is predominantly matte metallic, with subtle industrial detailing and no overt decorative embellishments.
description: A modern industrial ceiling lamp with three adjustable conical spotlights mounted on a circular base, featuring a matte metallic finish and minimalist design.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the lamp from a slightly angled side, highlighting two of the three conical spotlights and the circular mounting plate above.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a rotated side view, revealing the articulation of the lamp heads and the supporting metal arms.
description_view_2: View 2 is a direct front view, displaying all three spotlights and the vented front of the central lamp head.
description_view_3: View 3 offers another side angle, emphasizing the mounting structure and the rear of the lamp heads.
